data.reason: Bug introduced: `project_root = grindbot_dir.parent` is assigned BEFORE the `if grindbot_dir is None` check on the next line, so if `find_grindbot_dir` returns None, it will crash with AttributeError instead of showing the friendly error message. The new line needs to be moved after the None guard.

Coherent bug fix that moves worktree cleanup to after successful merge/push and adds a flag to prevent double-cleanup. The finally block is properly updated to check the flag and conditionally keep the branch based on task completion status. No secrets, debug code, or destructive changes.

Regression: old code stripped surrounding quotes from values (.strip('"').strip("'")), new code does not, so quoted KIE_API_KEY values will break. Also contradicts stated goal: commit claims to stop caching keys into os.environ, but new code now loads ALL other ~/.env variables into os.environ via setdefault, broadening the attack surface rather than narrowing it.

Clean, well-documented feature addition. Adds ignore-pattern loading from .grindbot/ignore and integrates it into execute_task with early skip return. No secrets, no destructive changes, no security issues. Minor note: commit message mentions scanner.py changes not present in diff, but the code that landed is coherent and safe.
